definition: measuring instrument that provides a means of visually inspecting a process regime and provides only a qualitative indication

definition_ml.en: measuring instrument that provides a means of visually inspecting a process regime and provides only a qualitative indication
definition_ml.fr: instrument de mesure fournissant un moyen pour inspecter visuellement un processus
definition_ml.de: Messgerät, das eine Vorrichtung bereitstellt, um einen Prozesszustand visuell zu prüfen und nur eine qualitative Anzeige liefert

note: IEC 60770-1 defines “indicator” as an instrument intended to visually indicate a physical quantity

note_ml.en: IEC 60770-1 defines “indicator” as an instrument intended to visually indicate a physical quantity

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: measuring instrument that provides a means of visually inspecting a process regime and provides only a qualitative indication
raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: IEC 60770-1 defines “indicator” as an instrument intended to visually indicate a physical quantity
